title: Tencent Announces Three Initiatives to Make Inbound Payments for International Visitors Easier Than Ever During APEC 2026
summary: TenPay Global and PayPal World to support PayPal users scanning Weixin Pay QR payment codes in China.

title: Tencent Expands Support for Korea’s Game Ecosystem: Partners with Game Culture Foundation and KOCCA
summary: Tencent and the Game Culture Foundation (GCF) today announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU).

title: Tencent Signs Partnership Agreements to Advance Gaming and AVGC Talent Development in India
summary: Tencent has signed Memoranda of Understanding with the Services Export Promotion Council and the Game Developer Association of India.

title: Weixin Brand Protection Report Marks a Decade of Partnership, Trust, and Progress in IP Protection
summary: Tencent today released its 2025 Weixin Brand Protection Report, marking a decade of progress in intellectual property (IP) protection on Weixin.

title: IMDA and Tencent Debut “Beyond the Screen” to Champion Real-World Connection through Digital Play
summary: The campaign encourages families to bridge the gap between play and purpose through gaming.

title: Tencent Unveils Hy3 preview; Model Enhances Agent Capabilities and Real-World Usability
summary: Tencent today launched and open sourced the Hy3 preview model.

title: Tencent Launches QClaw Globally, Lowering Barriers to AI Agent Deployment
summary: Tencent launched an international beta version of QClaw, enabling users to cultivate AI Agents that can help to enhance daily productivity and knowledge.

title: Weixin Empowers Local Businesses with Mini Program and Payment Solutions Ahead of Visit Malaysia 2026
summary: Malaysian businesses tap Weixin ecosystem to capture booming Chinese visitor spending.

title: Games for Change and Tencent Games Expand Raising Good Gamers with New Program to Help Families Navigate Positive Play in Video Games
summary: Games for Change today announced the launch of a new program.
